question: Explain what durable AI workflows are in 3 short bullet points.

results.name: Raw (baseline)
results.sample_output:
• Durable AI workflows are designed to maintain their performance and accuracy over time, despite changes in data, models, or environments.
• They ensure that AI systems can adapt to new data, handle changes in data distribution, and maintain their effectiveness in the face of data drift or concept drift.
• Durable AI workflows typically involve techniques such as model retraining, data reprocessing, and continuous monitoring to ensure that the AI system remains accurate and reliable.
